creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
This morning I updated to the new version of iwidgets/itk/itcl.
The new ports don't install itclsh/itksh anymore, which is needed
for the #! path at the beginning of applications.
Besides, iwidgets doesn't come through the patch-process because
it doesn't know which Makefile.in it has to patch (there are two
Makefile.in's now)

Fix: 

Back out to the previous version. Please...
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/lang/itcl && make
cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/itk && make
cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/iwidgets && make
